title: Resource Pack Menu (RPM)
description: This mod adds a new menu to the game. This menu is dedicated to resource packs, allowing you to easily change your resource packs or add them to your favorites, without any loading screen when applying or removing resource packs.
body:
This mod adds a new menu to the game dedicated to resource packs. It allows you to easily switch your resource packs, add them to favorites, and apply or remove them without a loading screen.

Features:

- A shortcut button to access the resource pack menu, whether in the main menu or in-game.


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1e4f3f55380c10143bc4ddf82ab8f5be3062880.png)

- No need to use the old resource pack menu.
- No need to wait for a loading screen when applying resource packs.
- No need to confirm compatibility for old or new resource packs.
- You can add your resource packs to favorites.
- Drag-and-drop support for easily rearranging and switching between resource packs.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fab46e4cb5aaee16caaa3d4a54f83247f5976d3d_0.webp)

If we reach 100,000 downloads, I will release it for newer versions.
